response.global_analysis: The video segment features Otonose Kanade performing 'Phony' followed by a duet of 'BANG!!!' with Kobo Kanaeru. The JSON reference only provides lyrics for 'BANG!!!', so I transcribed 'Phony' directly from the audio. The timing is strictly aligned with the vocal performance, with gaps during instrumental sections. English translations capture the emotional tone and semantic meaning of the lyrics.

subtitles.original: 幼い頃から 気づいたらそばにいた
subtitles.english: Since I was little, you've been by my side

subtitles.original: まるで空気のようだ
subtitles.english: Just like the air itself

subtitles.original: 僕は君とぎゅっと手を繋いで
subtitles.english: I held your hand tightly

subtitles.original: 楽しいことも涙も 僕は君に話し聞かせた
subtitles.english: The fun times and the tears, I told you everything

subtitles.original: 僕を笑う人 貶す声 掻き消すように 君は歌った
subtitles.english: As if to drown out the laughter and disparaging voices, you sang

subtitles.original: この声を君が自身の体温で ずっと温めてくれた
subtitles.english: You kept this voice of mine warm with your own heat

subtitles.original: 使い捨てだって 言ってたって
subtitles.english: Even if they say it's disposable

subtitles.original: 止まらないハイファイ タイトロープ
subtitles.english: This unstoppable hi-fi tightrope

subtitles.original: 一周回るものの たった一瞬だけでも
subtitles.english: In a whole cycle, even if it's just for a moment

subtitles.original: 交わる音 繋ぐ色 次は僕が君に歌うんだ
subtitles.english: Intersecting sounds, connecting colors, next I'll sing for you

subtitles.original: ゆるやかに 崩れ壊れてく
subtitles.english: Slowly, it's collapsing and breaking apart

subtitles.original: ゆるりゆるり首を絞めるように 昨日までの僕が殺されていく
subtitles.english: Slowly, as if tightening a noose, the me from yesterday is killed

subtitles.original: ゆるやかに 離れ離れを
subtitles.english: Slowly drifting apart

subtitles.original: ぷらり君に聞こえるのは 僕が知らない声になっていく
subtitles.english: What you hear as you drift away is becoming a voice I don't know

subtitles.original: ゆるやかに 崩れ壊れてく
subtitles.english: Slowly, it's collapsing and breaking apart

subtitles.original: ゆるりゆるり首を絞めるように 昨日までの僕が殺されていく
subtitles.english: Slowly, as if tightening a noose, the me from yesterday is killed

subtitles.english: Slowly drifting apart

subtitles.original: ぷらり君に聞こえるのは 僕が知らない声になっていく
subtitles.english: What you hear as you drift away is becoming a voice I don't know

subtitles.original: いつか君に届くかな
subtitles.english: Will it reach you someday?

subtitles.original: いや そんな日はきっと来ないだろうな
subtitles.english: No, that day will surely never come

subtitles.original: 声も身体もモダン君に 救われた僕の1人
subtitles.english: Voice and body, both modernized, I'm one of those who was saved

subtitles.original: 赤青合わせ彩った
subtitles.english: Colored with a mix of red and blue

subtitles.original: 踊って世界が溢れた
subtitles.english: Dancing until the world overflowed

subtitles.original: 巡り巡り会ったこの音を聴く全てが
subtitles.english: Everything that hears this sound we met in a cycle

subtitles.original: ゆるやかに 崩れ壊れてく
subtitles.english: Slowly, it's collapsing and breaking apart

subtitles.english: Slowly, as if tightening a noose, the me from yesterday is killed

subtitles.english: Slowly drifting apart

subtitles.english: Slowly, as if tightening a noose, the me from yesterday is killed

subtitles.english: Slowly drifting apart

subtitles.original: ぷらり君に聞こえるのは 僕が知らない声になっていく
subtitles.english: What you hear as you drift away is becoming a voice I don't know

subtitles.original: 好き 嫌い 常識 I don’t care 吹っ飛べ BANG!!!
subtitles.english: Like it, hate it, common sense, I don’t care - blow it up with a BANG!!!

subtitles.original: かかってこい majority あたしに負けはなし
subtitles.english: Bring it on, majority, I have no defeat

subtitles.original: ここまでって引かれた そのボーダー 誰のルール？
subtitles.english: Where did this 'border' come from? Whose rule is it?

subtitles.original: あの日の乗り越えた ウィークハート
subtitles.english: I overcame the weak heart of that day

subtitles.original: 強くなった シガ笑い飛ばした
subtitles.english: I got stronger, I blew the laughter away

subtitles.original: 言いたいことは言う やりたくないことはしない
subtitles.english: I say what I want to say, I don't do what I don't want to do

subtitles.original: 悪意気にしない
subtitles.english: I don't mind the ill will

subtitles.original: 同じがの当然だし あたしも変わらない
subtitles.english: It's natural to be different, I'm still me

subtitles.original: ニューノーマルの時代
subtitles.english: The era of the new normal

subtitles.original: Everybody say I want to be free
subtitles.english: Everybody say I want to be free

subtitles.original: いつもの思いはない それじゃ何も変えられない
subtitles.english: No conventional thoughts, then nothing can be changed

subtitles.original: Everybody say I want to life more
subtitles.english: Everybody say I want to life more

subtitles.original: 叶えて自分こそ 生きてるんだって
subtitles.english: Make it come true, myself, I am alive

subtitles.original: 生きてるんだって
subtitles.english: I am alive

subtitles.original: 呼吸から生まれた 空ときから選んできたんだ
subtitles.english: Born from a breath, I've chosen since that time

subtitles.original: 思い出せ あたしはあたしだ
subtitles.english: Remember, I am who I am

subtitles.original: 不可能のことなんて 何一つもない
subtitles.english: There's nothing that is impossible

subtitles.original: そりゃじゃない 大自分に
subtitles.english: That's right, to my great self

subtitles.original: 好き 嫌い 常識 I don’t care 吹っ飛べ BANG!!!
subtitles.english: Like it, hate it, common sense, I don’t care - blow it up with a BANG!!!

subtitles.original: 好き 嫌い 常識 I don’t care 吹っ飛べ BANG!!!
subtitles.english: Like it, hate it, common sense, I don’t care - blow it up with a BANG!!!

subtitles.original: 震えて鳴らす このリリックかます
subtitles.english: Trembling and ringing, firing these lyrics

subtitles.original: わからす 挑発 下を向いて舌打ちからの ハッ
subtitles.english: Make them understand, provocation, clicking my tongue while looking down, HA!

subtitles.original: Excuse me 容赦せず 倍返しクライ パンチライン 聴かせてやるよ
subtitles.english: Excuse me, without mercy, double the payback, listen to the punchline

subtitles.original: 焼き付かせな あたしがついてるから
subtitles.english: Make it burn in, because I'm with you
